steps.title: Find the circle area
steps.content:
Use the circle area formula with radius $3$:
$$A=\pi r^2=\pi(3)^2=9\pi$$

steps.title: Set equal areas
steps.content:
Let $s$ be the side length of the square. Its area is $s^2$, and it equals the circle's area:
$$s^2=9\pi$$
$$s=\sqrt{9\pi}=3\sqrt{\pi}$$
The answer is C.
